name: io.github.Tolomere21/latam-mcp
description: Peruvian public data — SUNAT RUC, BCRP FX, SEACE tenders. Sourced from official open-data.

environmentVariables.name: LATAM_MCP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your LATAM-MCP API key. Free tier at https://latam-mcp.com (no card).

environmentVariables.name: LATAM_MCP_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override API base URL (defaults to https://api.latam-mcp.com).
